_readme: Shared excavation state for the discovery loop — read/advance via scripts/rotation.py. Committed so any agent/machine resumes where the last one stopped. History of what is already mined lives in git log + manifest.jsonl.

find_books.note: OAPEN all-language + native-language queries (de/it/fr/es/pt/nl added 07-10); offsets 0-50 mined multilingual, 0-350 English-era

find_openaire.note: vein nearly dry: p1=300, p2=109, p3=52, p4=22

find_patents.note: weekly buckets 1900..now, walked backwards; mined: 2017-2020 W01, 1925-1940 W01s, 2015-W52..W08 (49 buckets). --countries flag NEW (default US): CN/EP/DE work, sitemap titles are English for all countries; CN buckets 2018-2020 W03 mined 07-10 (license=open for non-US)

find_purdue.note: PAUSED 07-10: docs.lib.purdue.edu serves 202-challenge to all our clients (bepress wall; referer trick fails). 400 pur- rows purged from manifest, entries kept in registry. Retry from different network or headless browser.

find_ibpsa.note: PAUSED — rate-triggered sgcaptcha poisons bulk fetches; needs slow pacing (~1 req/2-3s) before re-enabling; bs series biennial 1985-2025

find_sdz.note: sdz+hdz pages 1-5 mined 07-10 (165 kept), pages 6-10 mined 07-12 (35 sdz + 72 hdz); sdz ends ~p16, hdz ~p25

find_ademe.note: run with --pages 4; categories: 3153-batiment (504 results, mined p1-8), 3149-energies (p1-4), 3509-urbanisme (p1-4, +77 on 07-12); license=open (non-commercial reuse w/ attribution)

find_kitopen.note: EXHAUSTED 07-10: ddc:690 set fully harvested (9,346 records, ~700 passed CC filter). Other ddc sets (620 engineering?) unexplored.

find_japan.note: nilim 2012-2025 mined; tail re-run 07-12 recovered +78 from 2012-2017. NILIM listing only exists back to 2012, so next=2006 will no-op — switch to --series bri (139-158 done, new reports appear at top) or build the UNMINED 建築研究資料 series (data.html No.1-214)

find_wiki.note: category mode: depth 1 x lang-cap 250 mined 07-09; depth 2 x lang-cap 400 run 07-12 HIT the --max 800 cap — depth 2 NOT exhausted (pointer held at 2), re-run with --max 1500+ until dry before deepening; langlinks mode saturated for current curated set; --books zh done

find_patents_cn.note: CN patents (Chinese full text; license=open). Same weekly-bucket walk as find_patents but separate pointer; marathon runs it with --countries CN. Mined: 2018/2019/2020-W03, 2019-W46 (+400 on 07-12).

find_nrc.note: NRC Canada Publications Archive (~23k full-text objects; run with --pages 4, rotate queries via --q). DONE 07-12: 'canadian building digest' (251, complete CBD-1..250) + 'building research note' p1-3 (5, rest overlap/citation-only). NEXT --q: 'division of building research' (large), then 'building practice note', 'national building code' (old PD editions); reset next=1 when switching query
